response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified two main performance songs: 'GETCHA!' and 'Scuffed Up Age'. 2. Mapped out the scenes based on these songs and the transition period in between. 3. Used the search tool to find the official lyrics for 'GETCHA!' and 'Scuffed Up Age' using their respective composers and original artist credits. 4. Validated the lyrics and performer information. 5. Structured the information into the required JSON format, ensuring all fields were correctly filled, lyrics escaped properly, and timestamps adhered to the requested format, ensuring the end timestamp was within the video limit.
response.global_summary: The video is a live concert featuring VTuber Hakos Baelz performing the song 'GETCHA!', followed by a transition with audience participation, and concluding with Mori Calliope performing 'Scuffed Up Age'.

scenes.description: Hakos Baelz performs the song 'GETCHA!' on stage, accompanied by other virtual characters as backup dancers. The performance features high-energy choreography and stage effects.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I used to glorify my pain,
My love for anti-war, playing janken by myself,
Pretending not to see the darkness,
Now I am erasing and getting out.

Now I know all about you babe,
I don't want the handbags, the money or the diamond rings,
'Cause guys like you, they all don't care about the little things.
But anyway, I've overcome it,
Go ahead, try and fail, and I'll still be out of your reach.
I'm moving on and I'm never ever turning back, around, around, around again.
Now I'll go higher and I'll go higher,
And you couldn't take me down if you tried.
I'm leaving and taking back the love I showed you,
Now I can finally open my eyes.
Life goes on, I'll happily reject you,
Getcha out of my life, boy,
I'll getcha, getcha, getcha!

I've been waiting for this love for so long only to be rejected,
So I'll lock it up and throw the key away,
'Cause I'm fine, I'm alright,
Throwing you away was the final answer.\nGetcha out of my life, boy,
I'll getcha, getcha, getcha!
(Getcha out of my life, get out of my life)\n(Getcha out of my life, I'll getcha, getcha, getcha)\n\nOops! Deleted your number,
All of my friends used to warn me about ya,
Baby, I thought that I couldn't without ya,
I realized that I don't need no other (ah yeah).\n\nYou've lost the ability to take my breath away,
So I'll take a breath and float away,
I don't want the handbags, the money or the diamond rings,
'Cause guys like you, they all don't care about the little things.
So every day my self-love has been catching up,
It's time to strike first and go home with the trophy, so goodbye dear.\nI'm moving on and I'm never ever turning back, around, around, around again.\nNow I'll go higher and I'll go higher,\nAnd you couldn't take me down if you tried.\nI'm leaving and taking back the love I showed you,\nNow I can finally open my eyes.\nIt will be the electrifying final episode everyone was waiting for.\nGetcha out of my life, boy,\nI'll getcha, getcha, getcha!\n\nAll the lies and every mistake,\nAll the goodbyes and the heartbreaks,\nAll the tears that made me cry until I was dry,\nNo more.\nBreak!!\n(It's Giga and Kira)\nAre you ready?\nLet's go!\nAhh...\nI was a believer in saving your fake number,\nBut now your value to me has fallen to my knees,\nMy quiet life reigns at its peak,\nSo get out of my life like on a slide,\nMy blind love is melting like a popsicle,\nIt's so fragile and crumbling like a soda without gas,\nBut no pressure,\nTo not press ya, I'll getcha.\n\nI'm leaving and taking back the love I showed you,\nNow I can finally open my eyes.\nLife goes on, I'll happily reject you,\nGetcha out of my life, boy,\nI'll getcha, getcha, getcha!\nI've been waiting for this love for so long only to be rejected,\nSo I'll lock it up and throw the key away,\nThrowing you away was the final answer,\nGetcha out of my life, boy,\nI'll getcha, getcha, getcha!\n'Cause I'm fine, I'm alright,\nThrowing you away from my life was the final answer,\nGetcha out of my life, boy,\nI'll getcha, getcha, getcha!

scenes.description: A transition period in the concert where the performer leaves the stage, and the audience uses glow sticks to cheer.
Mori Calliope performs 'Scuffed Up Age' on stage, singing while moving around.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:

Honest to god, it's just not our time
Promises flawed by cosmic design
これくらいどうってことない
でも涙の跡は消せない
Coming of age, the stage doesn't light up
Just right away, they told us it might've
夢はもう諦めます
This cynical mind says "why'd you try?"

腐ったクズの日々だけど
この夜明け could seem a lot like "not your day"
それでも貴方を捨ててしまわないで
Can't find a reason to stay
Some busted world led astray
Once trusted, left to decay
We choose to go on anyway
Lost in thoughts of always changing pace
Allies and friends hiding more than one face
Not really surprising, why are you compromising?
The sun is rising a new horizon
With friendships lacking lies and
The knives in your back, so what are you prioritizing?
You aren't sick of crying? See, I don't buy it
But here we are, hanging on, fighting strong despite it
"儚い"じゃ表し切れない
もう目を閉じてしまいたいぐらいの世界
This cynical mind says "why'd you try?"
"Why not give up and play the bad guy?"
分からないんだ
埃塗れの街で
貴方の溜息の影
私の微かな火で照らしたいだけ

土砂に汚れて be real, it hurts to grow
Believing in a world of hate is overrated
まぁ、でも貴方は美しいのだから
Must be something surreal
An endless dream we can't heal
This rusted world wound up real
Still wanna love the way it feels
Late nights, the city feels dead, sure, but like
The lights and sights and sounds are treasures
こんな世界に抗って歩く力なんて
私にはないけど
Face up, this world can't kill that inner spark
Why don't we turn this scuffed up page we're writing in
こんな世界じゃ be real, I think we know
この夜明け is rarely fair, decide your fate
It's your life 貴方を捨ててしまわないで
Tomorrow's a brand new day
Like all those optimists say

What's your reason to stay?
This shining world led astray
Won't leave it all to decay
I choose to love it anyway
We choose to know the struggles of this scuffed up age we live in

I will give up on my dreams

I understand it, if you're going to try to drink it
While fate is making waves,
I'll hold this body that looks like it's going to collapse

Still, don't throw yourself away

This world that I almost want to close my eyes on

Why not give up and play the bad guy?
I don't understand, in this dust-covered town
The shadow of your sigh,
I just want to illuminate it with my faint light

Stained with mud, be real, it hurts to grow

Well, but because you are beautiful

Face up, this world can't kill that inner spark

This dawn is rarely fair, decide your fate

Tomorrow's a brand new day
Like all those optimists say

The question is, will you bear that pain?
What's your reason to stay?
This shining world led astray
Won't leave it all to decay
I choose to love it anyway
We choose to know the struggles of this scuffed up age we live in
